field.title: Месяц
field.formula:
CASE DATEPART([date], "month")
    WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT("Январь ", DATEPART([date], "year"))
    WHEN 2 THEN CONCAT("Февраль ", DATEPART([date], "year"))
    WHEN 3 THEN CONCAT("Март ", DATEPART([date], "year"))
    WHEN 4 THEN CONCAT("Апрель ", DATEPART([date], "year"))
    WHEN 5 THEN CONCAT("Май ", DATEPART([date], "year"))
    WHEN 6 THEN CONCAT("Июнь ", DATEPART([date], "year"))
    WHEN 7 THEN CONCAT("Июль ", DATEPART([date], "year"))
    WHEN 8 THEN CONCAT("Август ", DATEPART([date], "year"))
    WHEN 9 THEN CONCAT("Сентябрь ", DATEPART([date], "year"))
    WHEN 10 THEN CONCAT("Октябрь ", DATEPART([date], "year"))
    WHEN 11 THEN CONCAT("Ноябрь ", DATEPART([date], "year"))
    WHEN 12 THEN CONCAT("Декабрь ", DATEPART([date], "year"))
END
field.guid_formula:
CASE DATEPART([date_6pqd], "month")
    WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT("Январь ", DATEPART([date_6pqd], "year"))
    WHEN 2 THEN CONCAT("Февраль ", DATEPART([date_6pqd], "year"))
    WHEN 3 THEN CONCAT("Март ", DATEPART([date_6pqd], "year"))
    WHEN 4 THEN CONCAT("Апрель ", DATEPART([date_6pqd], "year"))
    WHEN 5 THEN CONCAT("Май ", DATEPART([date_6pqd], "year"))
    WHEN 6 THEN CONCAT("Июнь ", DATEPART([date_6pqd], "year"))
    WHEN 7 THEN CONCAT("Июль ", DATEPART([date_6pqd], "year"))
    WHEN 8 THEN CONCAT("Август ", DATEPART([date_6pqd], "year"))
    WHEN 9 THEN CONCAT("Сентябрь ", DATEPART([date_6pqd], "year"))
    WHEN 10 THEN CONCAT("Октябрь ", DATEPART([date_6pqd], "year"))
    WHEN 11 THEN CONCAT("Ноябрь ", DATEPART([date_6pqd], "year"))
    WHEN 12 THEN CONCAT("Декабрь ", DATEPART([date_6pqd], "year"))
END

field.title: month_number
field.formula: DATEPART([date], 'month')

field.title: CPF
field.formula:
IF SUM(SUM([total_followers_uae]) WITHIN [month_number]) > 0 THEN
    SUM(SUM([Факт расход]) WITHIN [month_number]) / SUM(SUM([total_followers_uae]) WITHIN [month_number])
END
field.guid_formula:
IF SUM(SUM([total_followers_uae_mf43]) WITHIN [ce38db10-8a0b-11ee-bc18-5b2f469e1bfd]) > 0 THEN
    SUM(SUM([fact_ukhz]) WITHIN [ce38db10-8a0b-11ee-bc18-5b2f469e1bfd]) / SUM(SUM([total_followers_uae_mf43]) WITHIN [ce38db10-8a0b-11ee-bc18-5b2f469e1bfd])
END
